tagline: LLM service engineer for specialized business domains
bio: At BHSN, I work across a wide range of legal and business document AI: contract review, legal search, business document LLMs, structured-output service design, evaluation systems, workflow/agent platforms, and self-serve operational tooling. Beyond training models, I'm more interested in turning AI on professional documents into something that actually ships as a product and runs in operations. Recently, I've designed evaluation systems combining traditional quantitative metrics with LLM-as-a-Judge on top of rubrics defined together with legal experts, and built internal tooling that lets lawyers and non-developer operators directly edit and test prompts, templates, workflows, and playbooks.
heroSubtitle: Connecting AI on professional documents to real products and operations
